wikitext:
'''Glory''' is the third {{2|Acts|Act}} in [[Slay the Spire 2:Main|Slay the Spire 2]]. == Overview == Glory is the third act of the game. The act spans 13 rooms, with the first 2 encounters drawn from a pool of weaker enemies. == Events == === Exclusive Events === * {{E|Battleworn Dummy|2}} * {{E|Grave of the Forgotten|2}} * {{E|Hungry for Mushrooms|2}} * {{E|Ranwid the Elder|2}} * {{E|Relic Trader|2}} * {{E|Reflections snoitcelfeR|2}} * {{E|The Round Tea Party|2}} * {{E|The Trial|2}} * {{E|Tinker Time|2}} * {{E|War Historian, Repy|2}} === Shared Events === * {{E|Crystal Sphere|2}} * {{E|Potion Courier|2}} * {{E|Self-Help Book|2}} * {{E|Slippery Bridge|2}} * {{E|Symbiote|2}} * {{E|The Future of Potions?|2}} * {{E|This or That?|2}} == Monsters == The following monsters debut in Glory:

=== First 2 Encounters === The first 2 encounters are drawn from a pool of weaker enemies. 2 of the 3 possible encounters are selected each run, each with equal probability. {| class="wikitable" ! style="width: 230px;" | Encounter ! style="width: 550px;" | Details |- | [[File:Devoted Sculptor Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Devoted Sculptor]] | A single {{2|Devoted Sculptor}}. |- | [[File:Scroll of Biting Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Scroll of Biting]][[File:Scroll of Biting Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Scroll of Biting]][[File:Scroll of Biting Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Scroll of Biting]] | 3 {{2|Scroll of Biting|Scrolls of Biting}}. |- | [[File:Living Shield Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Turret Operator#Living Shield|Living Shield]][[File:Turret Operator Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Turret Operator]] | 1 {{2|Turret Operator#Living Shield|Living Shield}} + 1 {{2|Turret Operator}}. |} === Remaining Encounters === After the first 2 encounters, the remaining monster fights are drawn from the normal pool with equal probability. {| class="wikitable" ! style="width: 230px;" | Encounter ! style="width: 550px;" | Details |- | [[File:Axebot Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Axebot]][[File:Axebot Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Axebot]] | 2 {{2|Axebot}}s. |- | [[File:Punch Construct Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Punch Construct]][[File:Cubex Construct Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Cubex Construct]][[File:Cubex Construct Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Cubex Construct]] | 1 {{2|Punch Construct}} + 2 {{2|Cubex Construct}}s. |- | [[File:Fabricator Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Fabricator]][[File:Summon Divider Icon.png]][[File:Fabricator Bots Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Fabricator]] | A single {{2|Fabricator}} (spawns [[Slay_the_Spire_2:Fabricator#Guardbot|Guardbot]]s, [[Slay_the_Spire_2:Fabricator#Noisebot|Noisebot]]s, [[Slay_the_Spire_2:Fabricator#Stabbot|Stabbot]]s, and [[Slay_the_Spire_2:Fabricator#Zapbot|Zapbot]]s during combat). |- | [[File:Frog Knight Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Frog Knight]] | A single {{2|Frog Knight}}. |- | [[File:Globe Head Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Globe Head]] | A single {{2|Globe Head}}. |- | [[File:Owl Magistrate Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Owl Magistrate]] | A single {{2|Owl Magistrate}}. |- | [[File:Scroll of Biting Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Scroll of Biting]][[File:Scroll of Biting Icon.png|class=monster-icon|48px|link=StS2:Scroll of
